framework.name: MCP positioned as leading agent protocol
framework.description: OpenID Foundation acknowledges MCP (Anthropic's Model Context Protocol) as the leading adoption framework for agent-tool connections, with A2A (Google) as secondary. This confirms MCP's de facto standard status even from the identity standards community.
framework.raw_quote: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is leading in adoption as the key framework for connecting language models to external data sources and tools

source.title: Identity Management for Agentic AI - OpenID
